$comment: Benchmark ground truth (FR-13, docs/06). expectedImageIds are the image slugs (filenames without extension in test-dataset/images/); the seed script stores each at storage_path 'seed/<slug>.<ext>' and the benchmark maps slugs to real image ids at run time. Ambiguous queries use ['*'] (matches no image) + expectClarification: only strategy D can score them, via a clarifying question. Queries reference the real travel photos plus the generated illustration scenes.

queries.query: notre dame cathedral gothic facade lit up at night
that polis lambo sports car at the airprt
a beach at sunset but also gothic cathedral architecture
the glass pyramid in the courtyard of the louvre
cristal clear turquiose watter over the rocks
an old stone fortress and people kayaking on the sea
that pretty one from the trip
a snowman with a santa hat and scarf in the snow
cat sleepin next to purple flowrs at dusk
a snowman and also a christmas nativity scene
a black and white pot-bellied pig in a garden
a snow-capped mountain peak under a blue sky
roling sand dunes in the dessert
